description: An analyst needs to urgently re-task an imaging satellite to capture pictures of a suspected new military construction site.

nodes.task_description: Submit a new collection request with the target coordinates and required image resolution.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst accurately fills out and submits the collection request form.

nodes.task_description: Check for available satellite passes over the target area in the next 24 hours.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst identifies a suitable satellite pass occurring in 3 hours.

nodes.task_description: Task the satellite to take the image during the identified pass.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst successfully sends the collection command to the satellite operations center.
